    Quantity/ amount of asset restricted due to an outgoing acat request
    Position.Builder

    Quantity/ amount of asset restricted due to an outgoing acat request
    Position.Builder
    pendingWithdrawal(PendingWithdrawal pendingWithdrawal)

    Position.Builder

    Quantity of currency being reserved for withdrawal.
    Position.Builder
    settled(Settled settled)
    Computed fieldsOriginal Settled Position before and as-of changesComputed based on the bucket values to represet the total settled position in an account Currently defined as `free` + `fpsl` + `pending_outgoing_acat` + `drip` + `pending_withdrawal`, but if/when new buckets are added this value will need to change to reflect them
    Position.Builder
    settled(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Settled> settled)
    Computed fieldsOriginal Settled Position before and as-of changesComputed based on the bucket values to represet the total settled position in an account Currently defined as `free` + `fpsl` + `pending_outgoing_acat` + `drip` + `pending_withdrawal`, but if/when new buckets are added this value will need to change to reflect them
    Position.Builder
    trade(PositionTrade trade)
    original trade position
    Position.Builder
    trade(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PositionTrade> trade)
    original trade position
    Position.Builder
    unrestricted(Unrestricted unrestricted)
    Computed based on the bucket values to represent the total unrestricted position in an account.
    Position.Builder
    unrestricted(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Unrestricted> unrestricted)
    Computed based on the bucket values to represent the total unrestricted position in an account.

    • fpsl

      public Position.Builder fpsl(PositionFpsl fpsl)
      Quantity of asset in use by the FPSL program. Should not be used by currency assets

    • fpsl

      public Position.Builder fpsl(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PositionFpsl> fpsl)
      Quantity of asset in use by the FPSL program. Should not be used by currency assets

    • free

      public Position.Builder free(Free free)
      Quantity of asset available for allocation for use by the FPSL program. Raw bucket values. These denote that a position is allocated to this purpose. Values may be negative

    • free

      public Position.Builder free(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Free> free)
      Quantity of asset available for allocation for use by the FPSL program. Raw bucket values. These denote that a position is allocated to this purpose. Values may be negative

      The most recent date an adjustment occurred

      accounts/{account_id}/positions/{position_id}

    • pendingDrip

      public Position.Builder pendingDrip(PendingDrip pendingDrip)
      Quantity of currency from a dividend being reserved for reinvestment. should not be used by non-currency assets

    • pendingDrip

      public Position.Builder pendingDrip(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PendingDrip> pendingDrip)
      Quantity of currency from a dividend being reserved for reinvestment. should not be used by non-currency assets

      Quantity/ amount of asset restricted due to an outgoing acat request

      public Position.Builder pendingWithdrawal(PendingWithdrawal pendingWithdrawal)
      Quantity of currency being reserved for withdrawal. should not be used by non-currency assets

    • pendingWithdrawal

      public Position.Builder pendingWithdrawal(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PendingWithdrawal> pendingWithdrawal)
      Quantity of currency being reserved for withdrawal. should not be used by non-currency assets

    • settled

      public Position.Builder settled(Settled settled)
      Computed fieldsOriginal Settled Position before and as-of changesComputed based on the bucket values to represet the total settled position in an account Currently defined as `free` + `fpsl` + `pending_outgoing_acat` + `drip` + `pending_withdrawal`, but if/when new buckets are added this value will need to change to reflect them

    • settled

      public Position.Builder settled(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Settled> settled)
      Computed fieldsOriginal Settled Position before and as-of changesComputed based on the bucket values to represet the total settled position in an account Currently defined as `free` + `fpsl` + `pending_outgoing_acat` + `drip` + `pending_withdrawal`, but if/when new buckets are added this value will need to change to reflect them

    • trade

      public Position.Builder trade(PositionTrade trade)
      original trade position

    • trade

      public Position.Builder trade(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PositionTrade> trade)
      original trade position

    • unrestricted

      public Position.Builder unrestricted(Unrestricted unrestricted)
      Computed based on the bucket values to represent the total unrestricted position in an account. Will always be less than or equal to `settled` settled - (pending_outgoing_acat + pending_drip + pending_withdrawal) ; however, if/when the API adds new buckets, Apex may adjust this to either incorporate the new value or not

    • unrestricted

      public Position.Builder unrestricted(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Unrestricted> unrestricted)
      Computed based on the bucket values to represent the total unrestricted position in an account. Will always be less than or equal to `settled` settled - (pending_outgoing_acat + pending_drip + pending_withdrawal) ; however, if/when the API adds new buckets, Apex may adjust this to either incorporate the new value or not

    • build

      public Position build()
